title: replace empty-string chat_state sentinel with Option<String>
description: chat_state: &mut String uses an empty string as a sentinel meaning 'no baseline state known'. This requires comments at every site (load_chats line 416 returns String::new() for the empty-chat case; run line 116 assigns String::new() on load failure; chat_delta_sync line 610 tests is_empty()). The sentinel is invisible to the type system and could silently collide if a server ever returned an empty state token. — Change the type to Option<String> throughout: load_chats returns Ok(None) when there are no chats to baseline, run holds mut chat_state: Option<String>, chat_delta_sync takes chat_state: Option<&str> and matches None | Some(_) explicitly. The None branch and has_more_changes branch then visibly converge on the same full-reload path.
